response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with roughly 18 years of experience, a CS degree from ETH Zürich, and genuine high-scale systems exposure (low-latency ad-tech services handling millions of requests per second). However, this is a Principal/IC6 role centered on growth and experimentation platforms, and the resume shows no experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, telemetry, or metrics-platform experience, and no evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams at enterprise scale. His scope has been senior IC work at small-to-mid startups, which falls well short of the principal-level, experimentation-domain bar this role sets.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals with high-scale, low-latency production systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Breadth across languages and stacks (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#, D) plus recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Testing and quality culture: TDD, authored test frameworks and runners, ran workshops and mentoring sessions
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
Seniority gap: career is senior/staff IC at small companies, with no demonstrated principal-level, cross-team architectural leadership at enterprise scale
No evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure ownership or statistical analysis depth required for experimentation quality work
